name: Stickman Sniper Western Gun
description: In Stickman Sniper: Western Gun, you become a brave Western gunslinger. Grab your gun and get ready for an exciting shooting mission! Each level will have a different scene, basketball court, street, etc. As a professional sniper, you&rsquo;ll face dangerous enemies in the Wild West and use your shooting skills to take them down.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
